meaning: adj.巴伐利亚的,巴伐利亚人的n.巴伐利亚人,巴伐利亚方言(见Bavaria)
examples: One of the best places is the Bavarian Forest National Park, which has many paths and forest roads for visitors to choose from.
You are listening to the news on Bavarian Radio.
The wonderfully-named Pomeranian Spitzel relaxes in the Bavarian village of Hailing.
Bavarian Education Minister Monika Hohlmeier said the headscarf was increasingly used as a political symbol.
The CDU's Bavarian sister party, the Christian Social Union, pushed her into promising tax cuts.
